Verbatim Keely law texts from c.1893, transmitted via Bloomfield-Moore and the SVP wiki, transcribed in private/keely_40_laws_classification.md. domain=svp on all. Contains 5 derived-from edges from shipped Keely cert families to their primary-source claims — this is the FIRST populated derived-from content in the QA-KG graph. Do not edit quote fields. -->
description: Keely 5-claim seed. 1 SourceWork (Keely 40 Laws). 5 SourceClaims tied to shipped Keely cert families via new derived-from edges. One dispute-contradicts edge to an internal observation documenting the Vibes 2026-04-05 Law-17 structural reclassification.

works.title: Keely — Forty Laws of Sympathetic Vibratory Physics (c.1893)
works.body: John Ernst Worrell Keely (1827–1898), Forty Laws of Sympathetic Vibratory Physics. Transmitted via Clara Bloomfield-Moore, 'Keely and His Discoveries' (1893), and transcribed on svpwiki.com/Laws-of-Being-Propositions by Dale Pond. Structural, sympathetic-transfer, dominant/control, aggregation/disintegration, and phenomenological laws spanning atomic pitch, resonance, catalysis, dissociation, and molecular synthesis.

claims.quote: There exists an infinite and unchangeable quantity of atomoles, the base of all matter; these are in a state of constant vibratory motion.
claims.title: Keely Law 1 (Matter and Force): infinite atomoles in constant vibratory motion

claims.quote: Coherent aggregates immersed in a medium pulsating at their natural pitch simultaneously oscillate with the same frequency, whether the pitch of the medium be a unison, or any harmonic of the fundamental pitch.
claims.title: Keely Law 6 (Sympathetic Oscillation): co-pitch entrainment

claims.quote: Energy manifests itself in three forms: Creative (vibrating aggregate), Transmissive (propagation of isochronous waves), Attractive (action upon other aggregates capable of vibrating in unisons or harmony).
claims.title: Keely Law 11 (Force): Creative / Transmissive / Attractive triune

claims.quote: All forces are different forms of Universal Energy unlike in their period-frequency, merging into each other by imperceptible increments; each form representing the compass of 21 octaves.
claims.title: Keely Law 17 (Transformation of Forces): 21-octave compass

claims.quote: Atoms have each a different and definite pitch, at which they naturally vibrate.
claims.title: Keely Law 18 (Atomic Pitch): each atom has definite natural pitch

observations.title: Verified: Law 17 '21 octaves' is structural, not empirical (Vibes 2026-04-05)
observations.body: Vibes' response to Will dated 2026-04-05 (OB a9307705) promotes Law 17 from Category 2 (Sympathetic transfer) to Category 1 (Structural ratio). The number 21 resolves as 7 × 3: seven = septenary subdivision (certified in [150] QA_SEPTENARY_CERT.v1 for the (Z/9Z)* action), three = triune nature of force (certified in [153] QA_KEELY_TRIUNE_CERT.v1). 'This reflects a complete subdivision of vibratory states rather than a conventional musical octave system.' Treating the 21 as empirical-octave count misreads the structural-integer derivation.

derived_from.rationale: [186] Dominant-control cert formalizes the invariant-substrate-with-motion structure asserted by Keely Law 1.
[185] Sympathetic-transfer cert formalizes the co-orbit entrainment mechanism Keely Law 6 describes.
[153] Triune cert formalizes the Creative/Transmissive/Attractive decomposition from Keely Law 11.
[186] Dominant-control cert uses Law 11's triune structure as one of its ingredients.
[184] Structural-ratio cert formalizes the definite-pitch-per-atom invariant from Keely Law 18.
[184] Structural-ratio cert uses the QA derived-coords law d=b+e, a=b+2e (axiom A2) to form ratios between elements; the cert cannot state its ratios without the A2 derivation rule.

[153] Triune cert partitions the non-zero QA state space (axiom A1: states in {1..N}) into three invariant categories; the triune decomposition is well-defined only because the zero state is excluded by A1.
